channel.title: training on Grapefruitmoon.net
channel.description: Recent content in training on Grapefruitmoon.net

item.title: SQLBits IV
item.description: I travelled down to Manchester last weekend to go to the SQLBits conference, something that I'd heard a lot of good things about. I'm very glad I went, as it was an extremely useful and informative event. And free! 🙂 With 28 sessions being given by 28 speakers, there was plenty of choice on what to go to…possibly too much as I missed out on a few that I would have really liked to have seen.
